name: Hardened Armed Dragon
name_jp: ハードアームドラゴン
desc:
(This card is not treated as an "Armed Dragon" card.)
You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by sending 1 Level 8 or higher monster from your hand to the GY. If you Tribute this card for the Tribute Summon of a Level 7 or higher monster, that monster cannot be destroyed by card effects.
mnst_eff:
(This card is not treated as an "Armed Dragon" card.)
You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by sending 1 Level 8 or higher monster from your hand to the GY. If you Tribute this card for the Tribute Summon of a Level 7 or higher monster, that monster cannot be destroyed by card effects.
eff:
(This card is not treated as an "Armed Dragon" card.)
You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by sending 1 Level 8 or higher monster from your hand to the GY. If you Tribute this card for the Tribute Summon of a Level 7 or higher monster, that monster cannot be destroyed by card effects.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Obelisk the Tormentor

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for Special Summon
Applies effect when Tributed for Tribute Summon
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
